name: Datadog
description: Datadog is a monitoring and observability platform for infrastructure, applications, logs, and more, offering REST APIs and SDKs to interact with product data and configuration.

auth_methods.note: Datadog requires two header keys: DD-API-KEY (API key) and DD-APPLICATION-KEY (application key) passed as headers. The docs do not describe OAuth2, Basic, or JWT for the public API.

credential_access.note: API and application keys are created in the account UI (Settings > API keys / Integrations > APIs). A user can sign up for a free trial account to obtain keys (trial signup documented). No docs indicate partner gating or manual approval.

api_surface.note: The API docs document many endpoint groups (metrics, traces, logs, dashboards, monitors, Synthetics, key management, etc.). Client libraries/SDKs are also provided, but the public API surface is RESTful and extensive.

buildability.note: Public REST APIs are documented and API/application keys can be self-created via account UI or API (and trial accounts are available), enabling immediate development.

queries: Datadog API documentation root site:docs.datadoghq.com "API" "Datadog API" "docs.datadoghq.com/api"
site:docs.datadoghq.com "create an API key" OR "Create an API key" "Datadog"
site:docs.datadoghq.com "API and application keys" "API keys" "app keys" Datadog account settings create key
site:datadoghq.com pricing API access "API" "access" Datadog pricing API keys included plan "API access" "partner"
site:docs.datadoghq.com "validate API" "validate" "validate API and application keys" Datadog validate endpoint /validate
